tweet_text: 🚨 UEFA rejects English clubs' request for 28-man Champions League squads after backlash from Spanish teams, including Atlético Madrid. The proposal won't be discussed at the upcoming executive committee meeting. ⚽️🇪🇸 #ChampionsLeague #FootballNews
article_title: English clubs’ plea for bigger Champions League squads rejected after Spanish backlash

tweet_text: 🚨 Tottenham are in talks with Roberto De Zerbi to potentially replace Igor Tudor as manager after ongoing struggles. A crucial decision for Spurs as they seek to revive their season! ⚽️🔄 #Tottenham #DeZerbi
article_title: Tottenham ready to rip up manager plans after secret Roberto De Zerbi talks
